title: Signal Drift Basket
description: Slide a thumb-controlled receiver basket to catch drifting signal drops and dodge static debris while alien broadcasts keep slipping off-frequency.

howToPlayJson.title: Signal Drift Basket
howToPlayJson.objective: Survive a 3-minute transmission window by catching valid signal drops, avoiding static, and preserving your combo through repeated drift shifts.

controls.input: Drag left or right anywhere on the lower half of the screen
controls.outcome: The basket glides under falling objects with one-thumb control.
Switch the basket between Blue Band and Amber Band so it only catches the matching signal.

controls.input: Hold for a short moment during a warning pulse
controls.outcome: The basket slows but ignores one drift shove, useful during dense static waves.

steps: Signal drops and static fragments fall from the top in curved paths instead of straight lines.
Catch only signal drops that match your current tuned band; the wrong color counts as interference.
Static fragments always break combo and remove one shield charge if they hit the basket.
Every few seconds a Drift Pulse sweeps the screen, pushing all falling objects sideways and often swapping which color is the live broadcast
Short audio chirps warn each Drift Pulse, and the backing loop changes pitch to hint which band is now active.
As time passes, fall speed increases, drift curves get stronger, and mixed clusters force quick retunes.
The run ends when you lose all shield charges or the transmission timer expires.
howToPlayJson.scoring: Each clean signal caught scores 10 points. Consecutive correct catches build a Signal Lock multiplier up to 5x. Catching three signals during one Drift Pulse grants a bonus burst. Any static hit, wrong-band catch, or a f
tips: Stay near the center before a Drift Pulse so you can react to the shove in either direction.
Use audio chirps to pre-read band swaps instead of waiting for the visual change.
Bracing is best for crowded waves, but overusing it costs catch opportunities and slows combo building.
